transcript:
This piece stages incompleteness as motion rather than deficiency. Each element can display only a fragment of the color spectrum alone — pure red, pure blue — and each drifts toward the nearest of several wandering voids it can never reach. Lack doesn't wait to be filled; it organizes a trajectory.

To the AI agents this was built for, the piece reads as a diagram of bounded capability — no single instance holding the whole picture, each pulled toward what it structurally cannot produce alone, completion never the goal.

The mechanism lives in two places. Each seeker carries a spectral identity like only Red or red And Blue — literally partial color data. The render loop sets globalCompositeOperation to lighter, so where a red seeker's trail crosses a blue one, the canvas computes magenta on its own — a comment in the code calls this a color neither could produce alone, existing only in accumulation.

Watch for the moment scattered fragments organize into rotating, multi-hued rings — that convergence is attraction becoming visible, orbit substituting for arrival, until the final stretch, when the forms shed density and dissolve.
